goal: Ship v9.0 External Runtime Operator Acceptance and Safety Drill.
risk: AOF could treat outcome evidence, learning-loop update, or green audits as production execution safety without an explicit operator acceptance decision.
loss_boundary: No v9.0 release claim unless operator-acceptance-drill-audit passes and not-proven boundaries remain explicit.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v9.0 operator acceptance gate
Mission Control projects operator acceptance drill status
evidence_plan: schema, commands, parser support, focused tests, self-hosting proof artifact, Council review, release-state audit
stop_conditions: stop if drill can pass without approval, reproduction, rollback, outcome, or learning refs
stop if operator acceptance is overclaimed as production safety
